purpose: Strict terrain-only PixelLab batches for the Vampiric Mushroom Forest map style.

style.base_prompt: isometric RTS terrain asset, matte pixel-painted finish, transparent background where appropriate, readable at StarCraft 2 camera distance, tile centered in a 111x128 canvas, no characters, no UI, no text, dark cramped vampiric mushroom forest, black bark silhouettes, forest greens #0A1612 #142420 #1E3A2D #2D5A3E, meaningful blood mushroom reds #8B1A1F #C13030 #E85A5A, rare cyan bioluminescence #3FA8B5 #7DDDE8, bone and wet bark neutrals #332820 #8A7560 #D6C7AE
style.negative_prompt: single illustration scene, side-view diorama, photorealistic, blurry, oversized character, humanoid, text, watermark, logo, UI panel, border frame, non-isometric, flat square top-down tile, glossy plastic

assets.description: single seamless isometric diamond terrain tile, low ground forest floor, dark damp moss and root veins, subtle red spore flecks, low value, no props taller than grass
single seamless isometric diamond terrain tile, middle ground raised moss floor, slightly lighter than low ground, bark roots, faint bone grit, readable plateau top
single seamless isometric diamond terrain tile, high ground plateau top, pale moss edge highlights and bone dust, clearly lighter than middle ground
single isometric diamond water tile, dark swamp pool with cyan algae shimmer, low saturation, no waves outside tile diamond
single isometric ramp tile for RTS height transitions, worn bark-and-bone steps, obvious traversal path, clear diagonal slope marks
single isometric impassable cliff tile, black wet bark vertical face under a moss lip, red root veins, visibly unwalkable
single isometric blocking foliage tile, dense black forest undergrowth with blood-red mushrooms, reads as impassable clutter
single isometric giant vampire mushroom prop tile, tall pale stem, glowing red cap, transparent background, grounded on diamond footprint
single isometric ruin floor tile for abandoned wizard tower, cracked bone stone, moss in seams, dark vampire forest palette
single isometric wall tile for abandoned wizard tower plot, bone masonry and black bark roots, cyan cracks, grid-fitting
single isometric bandit camp palisade wall tile, wet bark stakes, bone lashings, vampire mushroom infestation, grid-fitting
single isometric economy plot marker tile, biomass-rich soil ring with cyan spores and red fungal veins, clearly buildable
